AI Agent Audit
GitHubLinkedInGet in Touch

Open source MCP server

Know what your AI agents did.

If you handle client data, you need a record of every action your AI takes. Agent Audit Trail creates that record automatically.

View on GitHubHow it works

See the difference

NO OVERSIGHT
0 actions logged
Database
AI
Email
Files
CRM
Payments
API
Activity log
⚠Queried customer SSNs
??
⚠Sent email to unknown address
??
⚠Deleted 340 records
??
⚠Charged client $4,200
??

No record of what happened. No way to prove compliance.

Think of it this way

When an employee handles sensitive files, there\u2019s a paper trail. Access logs, timestamps, signatures.

AI agents don\u2019t leave that trail.

Agent Audit Trail is the sign-in sheet for your AI. Every action recorded. Every data access logged. Nothing editable after the fact.

How it works

01

Install

Add one line to your agent config. No code changes, no infrastructure.

02

Work normally

Your agents call tools the same way. Everything is recorded in the background.

03

Review anytime

Query logs, check violations, export reports when a client or regulator asks.

What the policy engine catches

PII AccessHIGH

Agent touched email, SSN, phone, or address fields.

Financial ThresholdsHIGH

Charge, refund, or transfer over your set limit.

Destructive ActionsCRITICAL

DELETE, DROP, or TRUNCATE in a database call.

Who this is for

01Financial advisors protecting client portfolio data.
02Law firms proving AI didn’t expose privileged info.
03HR teams using AI screening under anti-discrimination rules.
04Insurance agencies processing claims with AI.
05Accounting firms where every data access must be traceable.
06Anyone handling other people’s sensitive information.
10
MCP Tools
3
Default Rules
1
Line to Install

Installation

config.json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "audit-trail": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["agent-audit-trail"]
    }
  }
}

Interested?

The MCP server is free and open source. If you want help setting it up, or early access to the hosted dashboard, reach out.
